summary: Short news clip, with a Fox News bug, showing red spray-painted graffiti on the polished stone wall of a building. The graffiti reads 'KILL YOUR LOCAL ICE Agent' accompanied by a circled crosshair symbol. A person in light clothing stands at the wall beside the lettering. The tweet text describes the graffiti being painted on a federal building in Los Angeles during a downtown march.

script.scene: Red graffiti reading 'KILL YOUR LOCAL ICE Agent' with a circled crosshair on a stone building wall; a person stands beside it; Fox News bug.
